study_title: Transcriptome analysis of Andrena camellia and Apis mellifera
design: Bees were live-trapped from oil-tea flowers. Total mRNA was isolated from whole specimens of each individual. Bidirectional Illumina sequencing of 150-bp reads was performed following the manufacturers instructions.
